description: Testing initial display properties of daterange picker in both add/edit forms and default range values

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Add new form]
Check default display of Daterange picker item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: blank
+ Place holder value
...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
[Edit form]
Check default display of Daterange picker item
expected_result:
Display correctly as designed:
+ Position
+ Label of item
+ Default value: DB's value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check default value of default range
expected_result:
Display correctly as spec:
+ Use the correct library and correct CSS.
+ Selected range value

description: Testing calendar functionality including navigation, date/time selection, and range operations

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation of calendar when has event from user:
+ Click input box
+ Click the calendar icon
+ Click next icon in calendar
+ Click previous icon in calendar
+ Click time icon in calendar
expected_result: All actions are performed correctly as normal

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation of Arrow keys of calendar:
+ Up
+ Down
+ Right
+ Left
expected_result: All actions are performed correctly as normal

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when select date value of Fromdate/Todate
+ Select a current date in the calendar
+ Select a past date in the calendar
+ Select a future date in the calendar
expected_result: Can select and peform successfully with select value.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when select time value of Fromdate/Todate
+ Select a current time in the calendar
+ Select a past time in the calendar
+ Select a future time in the calendar
expected_result: Can select and peform successfully with select value.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when select date value
+ Fromdate < Todate
+ Fromdate = Todate
+ Fromdate > Todate
expected_result: Can select and peform successfully with select value.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Click on Clear button on Calendar widget
expected_result: The calendar is closed and date range value is blank.

description: Testing predefined date range options for quick selection of common time periods

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Click on <Today> option.
expected_result: Autofill From date and To date are current date into date range.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Click on <Yesterday> option.
expected_result: Autofill From date and To date are yesterday date into date range.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Click on <Last 7 Days> option.
expected_result: Autofill From date is last 7 days and To day is current date into date range.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Click on <Option Last 30 Days> option.
expected_result: Autofill From date is last 30 days and To day is current date into date range.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Click on <Option This Month> option.
expected_result: Autofill From date is first date and To day is end date of current month into date range.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Click on <Option Last Month> option.
expected_result: Autofill From date is first date and To day is end date of last month into date range.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Click on <Custom Range> option.
expected_result: User can input any value to Fromdate and Todate, with condition Fromdate <= Todate

description: Testing various input scenarios for the From date field, including valid formats, invalid inputs, and boundary cases

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when Input each valid value:
+ Valid date format
+ The special value (base on spec) 
+ The past time
+ The future time
+ Min date
+ Max date
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when Input invalid year value (YYYY):
+ Null (blank value)
+ Has Japanese number
+ Has Alphabet character
+ Japanese year
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check when Input invalid month value (MM):
+ Null (blank value)
+ Has Japanese number
+ Has Alphabet character
+ Japanese month
+ < 1
+ > 12

Check when Input invalid day value (DD):
+ Null (blank value)
+ Has Japanese number
+ Has Alphabet character
+ Japanese day
+ < 1
+ > Max days of month

Check when Input invalid hour value (hh):
+ Null (blank value)
+ Has Japanese number
+ Has Alphabet character
+ < 0
+ > 60

Check when Input invalid minute value (mm):
+ Null (blank value)
+ Has Japanese number
+ Has Alphabet character
+ < 0
+ > 60

Check when Input invalid second value (ii):
+ Null (blank value)
+ Has Japanese number
+ Has Alphabet character
+ < 0
+ > 60

Check when input over boundary value:
+ Min - 1
+ Max +1

Check when input wrong format to date time input box:
+ "00000000"
+ YYYY//MM//DD
+ YYYY / MM / DD
+ YYYY-MM-DD
+ YY/MM/DD
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when Fromdate = Null
expected_result: Success or failure base on spec

description: Testing the relationship and validation between From and To dates across different time spans

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input From date < To date
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input From date = To date
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input From date = To date = Null
expected_result: Success or failure base on spec

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when:
+ Todate - Fromdate = several days
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when:
+ Todate - Fromdate = several months
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Check operation when:
+ Todate - Fromdate = several years
expected_result: Process successfully with inputed value

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check when input From date > To date
expected_result: Display exact error message with correct format and position

description: Testing AM/PM selection functionality and time value constraints

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when select "AM" option
expected_result:
+ Can not input or select timevalue > 12:00:00 AM
+ If try to edit by inspect, auto convert: newtime = inputted time - 12:00:00

test_view_points.viewpoint: Check operation when select "PM" option
expected_result:
+ Can not input or select timevalue > 12:00:00 AM
+ If try to edit by inspect, auto convert: newtime = inputted time - 12:00:00
